buyer_name: The Common Services Agency (more commonly known as NHS National Services Scotland) (NSS)
english_summary: NHS National Services Scotland is procuring a framework agreement for various types of central venous catheters and related accessories. The tender covers 18 lots including coated and non-coated CVCs, paediatric catheters, PICC lines, arterial lines, dialysis catheters, implantable ports, stabilisation devices, and associated accessories.
what_they_want: Coated Central Venous Catheters (CVC), Non-Coated Central Venous Catheters, Paediatric Central Venous Catheters, Midline Catheters, Skin Tunnelling Catheters, PICC Lines (Antimicrobial), PICC Lines (Non-Coated), Seldinger arterial lines, Non-Seldinger Arterial Cannulas, IV Flush Saline Pre-filled Syringes, Stabilisation Devices, Dialysis Central Venous Catheters, Implantable Ports, Central Venous Catheter Insertion Packs, and related accessories and innovation items.
evaluation_criteria: Lots 1-14 are scored lots; Lot 15 (Accessories) and Lot 16 (Innovation) are unscored lots with suppliers automatically awarded if successful in scored lots 1-14; Lot 17 (Implantable Ports) and Lot 18 (CVC Insertion Packs) are unscored lots requiring suppliers to meet mandatory requirements and tender against any scored lot. Specific weighting criteria not mentioned.

original_title: NP16726 Multi Modality Imaging Equipment and Maintenance Framework
buyer_name: The Common Services Agency (more commonly known as Public Services Delivery Scotland) (PSD Scotland)
english_summary: This is a framework agreement for the supply, installation, maintenance, servicing and repair of a comprehensive range of diagnostic imaging and therapy equipment across NHS Scotland facilities. The procurement covers both new equipment purchase and ongoing maintenance services from OEM and third-party providers, including associated consumables and turnkey installation projects.
what_they_want: Bladder scanners; contrast and radiopharmaceutical injectors with syringes and consumables; diagnostic imaging equipment including X-Ray, Computed Radiography, CT, MR, PET/CT, Mammography, Fluoroscopy, Lithotripter, Interventional, Dental, Bone Densitometry, Image Intensifier, Nuclear Imaging, Ultrasound, Linear Accelerators; mammography vacuum devices; mammography non-wire lesion localisation detectors and devices; sentinel lymph node location detectors and non-radioactive tracer fluids; specimen cabinets; digital systems for scoliosis; Angiography equipment; mobile units or modular builds. Services required include supply, installation, pre-installation works, maintenance, servicing, and repair (both OEM and third-party/multi-vendor maintenance).

english_summary: NHS Greater Glasgow and Clyde is procuring one Linear Accelerator (Linac) to replace aging radiotherapy equipment that has reached end of life at the Beatson Satellite facility at University Hospital Monklands in Airdrie, Lanarkshire.
what_they_want: One (1) Linear Accelerator for radiotherapy treatment to replace end-of-life equipment

original_title: NHSDG Estates & Property ICES LOLER Inspection
english_summary: This tender is for LOLER (Lifting Operations and Lifting Equipment Regulations 1998) inspection services for community equipment in approximately 300 private residences throughout the Dumfries and Galloway region. The inspections support the Integrated Community Equipment Service, a joint venture between NHS Dumfries & Galloway and Dumfries & Galloway Council providing equipment to people with illness or disability to enable independent living at home.
what_they_want: LOLER inspection services for lifting equipment located in approximately 300 individual households as part of the Integrated Community Equipment Service.

original_title: Provision of Internal and External Hand / Grab Rails
english_summary: North Ayrshire Council is seeking to procure internal and external hand/grab rails through an open tender process. This is a straightforward procurement for accessibility equipment to be installed in council properties or facilities.
what_they_want: Internal and external hand rails and grab rails for installation purposes.
